description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you are adjacent to an ally who also has this feat and both of you are affected by the same spell or spell-like ability, you may amplify the spellâs effect on yourself. As an immediate action as the spell affects you and your ally, you can increase the effective caster level of the spell by 3. This increase in caster level doesnât affect the spellâs duration or the effects for any target of the spell other than yourself. The increase doesnât stack with any other effects that might increase the spellâs caster level.
